caption: A person's hands are seen interacting with collectible cards and a black foam carrying case in a setting that appears to be a hobby shop or a designated breaking station. The background features a white surface decorated with a graphic of teal palm trees and an orange sun. The logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are prominently displayed on the screen. A man with a beard, wearing a dark blue shirt, is visible in a smaller inset window, observing the activity. As the sequence progresses, the person's hands carefully slide a white trading card into a slot within the black foam case. The frames transition from the initial placement of the card to it being fully seated in the protective foam. Nearby, stacks of plastic card slabs are visible, indicating a large collection of graded trading cards.
